summary: Full backend (pytest, 16 tests) + frontend (Playwright) testing of the pharmacy issues tracker. All backend endpoints and all critical frontend flows pass. App is in PT-PT, JWT via httpOnly cookies, all features in review request verified end-to-end.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' — non-blocking accessibility warning from Radix UI. Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to CreateProblemaSheet and ProblemaDetailSheet for full a11y compliance.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to the two Sheet components to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: bcrypt hashing OK ($2b$), httpOnly cookies set with samesite=lax, CORS allow_credentials=true with explicit origins from env — solid.
Seed admin is idempotent: creates if missing, updates password if changed — meets playbook requirement.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded across all endpoints via projections / _clean().
No brute-force / rate-limit / lockout protection on /api/auth/login. Recommend adding a lockout after 5 failed attempts (per auth playbook).
JWT secret loaded from env — good; cookies use secure=False which is acceptable for preview environment but should be True in production behind HTTPS.
Pydantic ProblemaCreate enforces TIPOLOGIA/PRIORIDADE/ESTADO Literals — good input validation.
Frontend axios uses withCredentials and REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — correct.
All required data-testid attributes are present and reachable; selectors match the spec in review_request.
test_credentials: admin@farmacias.pt / admin123 (seeded on startup, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed problemas and follow-ups; cleanup fixture + manual sweep performed at end. DB left clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_problemas_api.py and cover auth (login/logout/me/invalid), CRUD on /api/problemas, filters (estado/tipologia/q), follow-up with state change, /api/stats structure, and CSV export. Reuse for regression. UI: shadcn Select dropdowns need force=True click + small wait_for_timeout(300) before clicking option text. Detail sheet opens by clicking a problema row; selector pattern `tr:has-text(...)` works to find dynamically created rows.
verified_flows: Invalid login shows PT message 'Credenciais inválidas' OK
Dashboard KPIs (Total/Abertos/Em Curso/Resolvidos) render with values OK
Logout redirects to /login; /problemas without auth redirects to /login OK
Novo problema sheet -> create with Tipologia TFO -> row appears in table OK
Filters: search by text returns 1 matching row; Clear filters works OK
Click row opens detail sheet with timeline + quick status actions OK
Add follow-up with novo_estado creates timeline entry and changes problema estado OK
Quick action 'Resolvido' updates estado (verified via detail-estado) OK
Relatorios page loads with export button OK
CSV export endpoint returns text/csv with PT-PT headers OK
